situational_context: Running comeback week 5: 7 runs completed since May 3 (progressed from 2.5 km to 5.2 km). Run #7 executed June 3 (5.23 km, FC 140, suffer 27) — now consolidating at 5 km distance. Primary modality remains e-bike commuting on sur-site days. Chronic load declining (15.61, down from 22.3 on May 14) due to fewer commute days — training status oscillates between Maintaining and Detraining. ACWR at 0.88 — safely within bounds. HRV today UNBALANCED (28, post-run recovery dip expected to resolve within 24-48h). VO2max running improved to 39.9 (from 38.3 at comeback start). Weight down to 102.97 kg (from 104.10). Weekend active plan: gravel ride Saturday, Run #8 Sunday. Two sur-site days Thu-Fri will contribute ebike commute load. No new labs since Dec 2025. Vitamin D retest due ~July 2026.

recommendations.text: Execute Run #8 on Sunday (5 km, FC target <=137 bpm). Two successful 5 km runs validate the palier and open progression to 5.5-6 km. If FC remains >140 at easy pace, suspect accumulated fatigue — do not progress.
recommendations.measurable: Run #8 completed, avg FC <=137, zero post-run pain >24h

recommendations.text: Monitor HRV recovery: today's 28 (UNBALANCED, -2.6 sigma) must recover to >=34 by Saturday. If still UNBALANCED Friday night, downgrade Saturday gravel from Z2 50 min to easy ebike 30 min.

Address caloric surplus: 7d avg 3,261 kcal vs 2,500 target (+30%), driven by high fat (168g vs 80g target). Weight still trending down but surplus slows progress. Portion control at dinner (avg 1,584 kcal).
recommendations.measurable: 3 of next 7 days within +/-200 kcal of 2,500 target
